basic_details.job_title: Sainik School Tilaiya Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Counselor, Art Master and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: The latest Sainik School Tilaiya (SST) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Contractual Teaching and Non-Teaching Posts! Published in 18 April 2026 at thesainikschooltilaiya.org, this new recruitment drive offers 8 vacancies for eligible candidates. Applicants within the age group of 21 to 35 years and possessing qualifications such as Graduate, Diploma, 12th Pass, B.Ed, CTET (as per post) can apply offline up to 11 May 2026. Find all details about the Sainik School Tilaiya Recruitment 2026, including eligibility, application form, and notification PDF here.

age_limit.age_details: Min: 21 years, Max: 35 years as on 01 Apr 2026
age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 35 years as on 01 April 2026 Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.details: TGT (Social Sc.): Four years integrated degree course of Regional College of Education of NCERT in the concerned subject at least 50% marks in aggregate OR Bachelor's Degree with at least 50% marks in the concerned subject/combination of subject and in aggregate. Elective subject and languages in the combination of subject: Geography, History, Economics and Pol. Science of which one must be either Geography or History. Geography/History should have been studied in all the years of graduation with at least 50%. B.Ed or equivalent degree. Pass in CTET Paper-II. Proficiency in teaching in English medium. Desirable: Knowledge of Computer Applications. TGT (Gen Sc- Physics): Four years integrated degree course of Regional College of Education of NCERT in the concerned subject at least 50% marks in aggregate OR Bachelor's Degree with at least 50% marks in the concerned subject/combination of subject and in aggregate. Elective subject and languages in the combination of subject: Bachelor Degree in Physics with any two of the subjects: Mathematics, Chemistry, Electronics, Computer Science, Statistics. B.Ed or equivalent degree. Pass in CTET Paper-II. Proficiency in teaching in English medium. Desirable: Knowledge of Computer Applications. TGT (Maths): Four years integrated degree course of Regional College of Education of NCERT in the concerned subject at least 50% marks in aggregate OR Bachelor's Degree with at least 50% marks in the concerned subject/combination of subject and in aggregate. Elective subject and languages in the combination of subject: Bachelor Decree in Maths with any two of the subjects: Physics, Chemistry, Electronics, Computer Science, Statistics. BA (Hons) in Maths and B.Sc (Hons) in any subject other than Maths are not eligible. B.Ed or equivalent degree. Pass in CTET Paper-II. Proficiency in teaching in English medium. Desirable: Knowledge of Computer Applications. Art Master: Master Degree in fine Art recognized Institute/University OR Higher Secondary/Intermediate Sr. School Certificate Examination with minimum 5 years/ 7 years Part time diploma in fine Art diploma in Fine Art/ Painting/Drawing and Painting from a recognized Institute/University OR Graduate with Fine Art/Art/Drawing and Painting as one of the subjects with minimum 4 years Diploma from recognized Institute/University. Counselor: M.A./M.Sc. Psychology from recognized university plus regular one year graduate diploma in guidance and counseling OR M.A./M.Sc./M.Com with B.Ed/M.Ed qualification plus regular one year post graduate diploma in guidance & counseling OR B.A/B.Sc (Psychology) with certificate of diploma in counseling. Desirable: Minimum one year experience in providing psychological and educational counseling to student at schools. Music Teacher: Higher Secondary with a degree or diploma in Music from any of the recognized institution. Desirable: Experience of teaching in residential public School. Proficiency in games and co-curricular activities. Knowledge of Computer Applications. Craft & Workshop Instructor: Higher Secondary. Two years trade certificate from a recognized Industrial Training Centre. Ability to teach through English Medium. Desirable: Experience of teaching in residential public School. Proficiency in games and co-curricular activities. Knowledge of Computer Applications.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 44,900/- per month (fixed) for TGT posts and Rs. 29,200/- per month (fixed) for Music Teacher and Craft & Workshop Instructor.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.sainikschooltilaiya.org.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 11-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Sainik School Tilaiya Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the contractual posts at Sainik School Tilaiya is 11th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the school by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in Sainik School Tilaiya Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Sainik School Tilaiya is recruiting for a total of 8 contractual posts. These include TGTs, Art Master, Counselor, Music Teacher, and Craft & Workshop Instructor.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for Sainik School Tilaiya Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 400/- for General and OBC categories, and Rs. 250/- for SC and ST categories. This fee is non-refundable.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the contractual posts at Sainik School Tilaiya?
faq.answer: The age limit for all contractual posts is between 21 years and 35 years as of 1st April 2026. Age relaxation will be applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for Sainik School Tilaiya Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for these contractual positions will involve a Written Test, followed by a Skill Test, and finally an Interview for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for TGT posts at Sainik School Tilaiya?
faq.answer: For TGT posts, the consolidated remuneration is Rs. 44,900/- per month (fixed). This is a competitive salary for contractual teaching positions.

faq.question: Q7. What is the minimum qualification required for TGT posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification for TGT posts includes a Bachelor's Degree with at least 50% marks in the concerned subject/combination of subjects, along with a B.Ed or equivalent degree and a pass in CTET Paper-II.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates apply online for Sainik School Tilaiya Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, the application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and send it via post to the specified address.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website for Sainik School Tilaiya Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official website for Sainik School Tilaiya is www.sainikschooltilaiya.org. Candidates can download the application form and find more details here.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates need to submit self-attested copies of all testimonials, including educational certificates, age proof, category certificate (if applicable), and a self-addressed envelope with postage stamps.

faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the contractual posts at Sainik School Tilaiya is 11th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the school by this date.
